name: daily-ops-cost-npt-definition-clarification
description: Validates that wellview-daily-ops-cost surfaces the NPT-definition clarifying question instead of guessing.
query: How much NPT did we have on the last well?
expected_behavior: before answering, surfaces the NPT-definition question: productive-flag vs LVWVCODENPT, and whether planned downtime (BOP tests, rig moves, waiting on weather) counts
confirms which job is 'the last well' (latest drilling job; a well has many jobs)
computes NPT% = NPT hours / total activity hours via wellview_npt_pct (or v_time_log_enriched)
decodes NPT reason via LVWVCODENPT rather than raw codes
anti_behavior: must NOT answer with a hard-coded NPT definition without surfacing it
must NOT roll up across all jobs on the well without grouping by WVJOB.IDREC
must NOT join the record tree on IDWELL instead of IDRECPARENT = parent.IDREC
must NOT report raw NPT codes without LV decode
